nasb.text: But one of the soldiers pierced His side with a spear, and immediately blood and water came out.

esv.text: But one of the soldiers pierced his side with a spear, and at once there came out blood and water.

cnv.text: 但是有一個士兵用槍刺他的肋旁，立刻有血和水流出來。

ccb.text: 只是有一个士兵用矛刺了一下祂的肋旁，顿时有血和水流了出来。

csbs.text: 不过有一个士兵用长矛刺入耶稣的肋旁，立刻有血和水流了出来。
